---
title: "Exercises"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: .
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
toc: false
---

A growing collection of quantitative economics exercises — replications and extensions
of public empirical work from central banks, academic papers, and sell-side research,
built on public data.
